_doc: Declarative field schema for contract forging. forge.py loads this and both the terminal CLI and the chat wizard iterate it — the questions live here, not hardcoded in Python. Field order IS the elicitation order. parse: str | csv | predicate | float (resolved to a parser in forge._PARSERS). essential: asked in the simpler terminal forge (`gorgon contract forge`); non-essential fields are asked only in the full flow and otherwise take their default. ask=false sets a constant without prompting (never consumes an answer).
safeword_prompt: Contract is coherent. Sign with a SAFEWORD to seal it (blank to cancel)

fields.prompt: Root gate — checkable end-state as 'criterion:target' (e.g. present:honeypot, absent:web01; optional)
Importance — how much does closing this goal matter? [routine|important|critical]
